title: Giving Feedback Professionally
description: Structured feedback using SBI (Situation-Behavior-Impact) and diplomatic softeners.
summary_pt_br: Feedback estruturado: Situação-Comportamento-Impacto (SBI). 'Ontem... quando você... senti...'

scenes.subtitle_en: Structured feedback using SBI (Situation-Behavior-Impact) and diplomatic softeners.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Feedback estruturado: Situação-Comportamento-Impacto (SBI). 'Ontem... quando você... senti...'

scenes.text_en: Structured feedback using SBI (Situation-Behavior-Impact) and diplomatic softeners. Focus: giving feedback professionally. In yesterday's call, when you spoke over the client, it made him pause.
scenes.text_pt: Feedback estruturado: Situação-Comportamento-Impacto (SBI). 'Ontem... quando você... senti...' Foco: giving feedback professionally. Na ligação de ontem, quando você sobrepôs o cliente, ele pausou.

scenes.title: Giving Feedback Professionally
scenes.body_en: SBI: 'In yesterday's meeting (situation), when you interrupted (behavior), it made the team feel unheard (impact).' Pair with 'I noticed...' and 'I'd love to explore...'
scenes.body_pt: Feedback estruturado: Situação-Comportamento-Impacto (SBI). 'Ontem... quando você... senti...'

examples.en: In yesterday's call, when you spoke over the client, it made him pause.
examples.pt: Na ligação de ontem, quando você sobrepôs o cliente, ele pausou.

examples.en: I'd love to explore how we can handle objections differently.
examples.pt: Adoraria explorar como lidar com objeções diferente.

examples.en: I noticed you've been quiet in standups lately.
examples.pt: Percebi que você tem ficado quieto nos standups.

exercise.question: Complete: "In ___ call, when you spoke over the client, it made him pause."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "In yesterday's call, when you spoke over the client, it made him pause."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Na ligação de ontem, quando você sobrepôs o cliente, ele pausou.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
I'd love to explore how we can handle objections differently.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "I'd love to explore how we can handle objections differently."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Adoraria explorar como lidar com objeções diferente.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Giving Feedback Professionally — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre giving feedback professionally. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I need to give hard feedback. Help me.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Start with the situation, not the person.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: When you interrupted twice, the client paused.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do I describe the impact?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It affected how confident the client felt.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'd love to explore how to handle this.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close warmly without retreating from the truth.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'm sharing this because I believe in you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Feedback, done well, is a form of respect.

scenes.title: The one-on-one
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the feedback structure. Use at least two SBI elements.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the glass meeting room, Zara delivered feedback that her teammate would remember for years.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: In yesterday's call with the client, when you spoke over him twice, it made him visibly hesitate.

paragraphs.speaker: Teammate
paragraphs.en: I didn't realize I had done that. I was nervous and pushing too hard, honestly.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: I'd love to explore together how we can handle objections without rushing next time.

paragraphs.speaker: Teammate
paragraphs.en: Thank you for telling me directly — I would rather hear this from you than guess later.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Feedback, Zara often said, is a door you open slowly — never a hammer you swing quickly.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Giving Feedback Professionally". Structured feedback using SBI (Situation-Behavior-Impact) and diplomatic softeners. In yesterday's call, when you spoke over the client, it made him pause. I'd love to explore how we can handle objections differently. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Giving Feedback Professionally". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Giving Feedback Professionally".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Giving Feedback Professionally".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
